Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Meta 광고 레퍼런스 수집 시스템

- 쇼핑몰 크롤러 \(네이버, 쿠팡, 올리브영\)
- Meta 광고 라이브러리 크롤러
- Supabase 데이터베이스 연동
- Next.js 대시보드
- GitHub Actions 자동화 설정

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash("C:\\Users\\MKM 30002\\Desktop\\개발\(1\)\\.github\\workflows\\daily_crawl.yml" << 'EOF'
name: Daily Meta Ad Crawling

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 15 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  crawl:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.10'
      - run: pip install selenium webdriver-manager python-dotenv
      - run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y google-chrome-stable
      - run: python main_meta.py
        timeout-minutes: 360
      - run: |
          git config user.email "actions@github.com"
          git config user.name "GitHub Actions"
          git add meta_output/
          git commit -m "Daily crawl $\(date +'%Y-%m-%d'\)" || exit 0
          git push
EOF)
